description: X-ray and electron diffraction data for quasicrystal materials
key_principle: Irrational tau = phi = 1.618... ratios between principal peak positions; requires 6 integer indices for icosahedral

indexing_scheme.icosahedral: 6 integers (h1 h2 h3 h4 h5 h6) along 6 reciprocal lattice vectors
indexing_scheme.decagonal: 5 integers in plane + 1 along periodic axis
indexing_scheme.peak_ratio_test: ratio of any two principal d-spacings is a power of tau

materials.pattern_description: Sharp spots in 10-fold arrangement - impossible for periodic crystal

materials.notes: Stable phase; single crystal samples show perfect icosahedral diffraction

materials.pattern_type: 10-fold in plane, periodic streaks along c
